title: emotecraft fix animate texture
description: Some texture packs glitch when used with Emotecraft. This mod fixes that.
body:
I made this mod for a server with friends to fix a visual glitch between Emotecraft and player animation resource packs, such as Fresh Animations: Player Extension.

The issue happened because Emotecraft would bug out when used together with those animation packs, so I put this together as a simple fix. I made it in basically one day, so it may still have bugs or edge cases, but it worked well enough for what I needed and I decided to share it in case it helps someone else too.

This is an unofficial, fan-made fix. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original creators of Emotecraft or the resource pack mentioned above. I just made it as a fan of their work for personal use, and I thought it might be useful for others dealing with the same problem.

If it helps you, awesome. Thanks for checking it out :D.

[Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)
